query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS compliance_tasks (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  businessEntityId INT,
  houseId INT NOT NULL,
  positionHolderId INT,
  taskType ENUM('payroll_tax_deposit', 'quarterly_941', 'annual_940', 'w2_filing', '1099_filing', 'k1_filing', 'state_tax_deposit', 'state_quarterly', 'annual_report', 'business_license', 'i9_reverification', 'workers_comp_audit', 'benefits_enrollment', 'performance_review', 'custom') NOT NULL,
  taskName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  dueDate TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  reminderDate TIMESTAMP,
  isRecurring BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  recurrencePattern ENUM('weekly', 'biweekly', 'monthly', 'quarterly', 'annually'),
  assignedToUserId INT,
  completedAt TIMESTAMP,
  completedByUserId INT,
  completionNotes TEXT,
  status ENUM('upcoming', 'due_soon', 'overdue', 'completed', 'skipped') DEFAULT 'upcoming',
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ytd_totals (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  positionHolderId INT NOT NULL,
  taxYear INT NOT NULL,
  ytdGrossPay DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  ytdRegularPay DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  ytdOvertimePay DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  ytdBonusPay DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  ytdFederalTax DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  ytdStateTax DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  ytdSocialSecurity DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  ytdMedicare DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  ytdHealthInsurance DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  ytdRetirement DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  ytdOtherDeductions DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  ytdNetPay DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  ytdRegularHours DECIMAL(8,2) DEFAULT 0,
  ytdOvertimeHours DECIMAL(8,2) DEFAULT 0,
  lastPayrollRecordId INT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ytd_totals (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  positionHolderId INT NOT NULL,
  taxYear INT NOT NULL,
  ytdGrossPay DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  ytdRegularPay DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  ytdOvertimePay DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  ytdBonusPay DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  ytdFederalTax DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  ytdStateTax DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  ytdSocialSecurity DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  ytdMedicare DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  ytdHealthInsurance DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  ytdRetirement DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  ytdOtherDeductions DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  ytdNetPay DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  ytdRegularHours DECIMAL(8,2) DEFAULT 0,
  ytdOvertimeHours DECIMAL(8,2) DEFAULT 0,
  lastPayrollRecordId INT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
